scripts.build: vite build && cp -R slides dist/slides && cp -R research dist/research && mkdir -p dist/prototype1 && cp "Onboarding Assessment Standalone.html" dist/prototype1/index.html && mkdir -p dist/prototype2 && cp "Dashboard Standalone.html" dist/prototype2/index.html
scripts.dev:site: npm run build:midterm && npx --yes serve showcase/dist -p 5177
